## Join the project

- GitHub: [github.com/erayates/cahoots](https://github.com/erayates/cahoots)
- Issues: [github.com/erayates/cahoots/issues](https://github.com/erayates/cahoots/issues)
- Discussions: [github.com/erayates/cahoots/discussions](https://github.com/erayates/cahoots/discussions)
- Contributing: [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/erayates/cahoots/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Code of Conduct: [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](https://github.com/erayates/cahoots/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Support

- Use GitHub Discussions for implementation questions and API design feedback.
- Use GitHub Issues for bugs, regressions, or documentation gaps.
- Follow the contribution guide before opening a pull request so local quality checks match CI.
